name: Improper Handling of Incomplete Structural Elements
description: The product does not handle or incorrectly handles when a particular structural element is not completely specified, such as a truncated header, partial XML tag, or incomplete protocol frame. This leads to unexpected application state or integrity violations.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (protocol data, structured messages, serialized input) with potentially incomplete structural elements flowing to TRANSFORM nodes (parsers, deserializers) without a CONTROL mediator (completeness check, structural element boundary validation) that verifies all required parts of the structural element are present before processing.
